headline: Apple’s AI promises are finally, almost, sort of, here
summary: Apple announced new AI features, including 'Siri AI,' at its developer conference. The company's focus was largely on catching up with existing AI technology. CEO Tim Cook made bold promises about pushing limits, but execution lags.

headline: Everything you need to know about Prime Day 2026
summary: Amazon Prime Day 2026 details are emerging, addressing common questions. Information includes start dates, the reason for its June timing, and when deals will go live. Expect comprehensive coverage and answers to all your Prime Day queries.

headline: Nintendo Direct June 2026: All the news and trailers
summary: Nintendo held its June 2026 Direct, revealing new games and trailers. The event is crucial amid a Switch 2 price hike and updates to the console's game lineup. This follows recent announcements from PlayStation and Xbox.

headline: Apple’s best AI idea looks a lot like vibe coding
summary: Apple's latest AI concepts mostly align with existing industry standards. New features include chatbots, text summarization, and image generation. The company appears to be playing catch-up, with some ideas resembling 'vibe coding'.

headline: Dragon’s Dogma 2: Dark Arisen Announced For Nintendo Switch 2
summary: Dragon’s Dogma 2: Dark Arisen has been officially announced. The game is confirmed for release on the upcoming Nintendo Switch 2. No further details were provided in the article's text.

headline: Star Wars Zero Company Is Up for Preorder – Here’s What Comes in Each Edition
summary: Preorders are now available for the upcoming title, Star Wars Zero Company. The game is set to be released on August 27. Details regarding each edition and their respective costs are provided.

headline: MTG Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Booster Box Hits Lowest Price Ever at Amazon
summary: The Magic: The Gathering Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Play Booster Box is currently at its lowest price ever on Amazon. Shoppers can save almost 50% on a full box of 30 packs. This represents a significant deal for collectors and players alike.

headline: The Wolf Among Us 2: The First Preview
summary: The first preview of The Wolf Among Us 2 has been released. The game's development is back on track, powered by Unreal Engine 5. Fans are excited that one of Telltale's best adventures is being resurrected.

headline: Football regulator contacts West Ham over 'serious allegations' against Sullivan
summary: A football regulator has engaged with West Ham United regarding grave allegations against Sullivan. Multiple women accuse the billionaire of abusing his power and preying on them. Some accusers were reportedly in their late teens at the time.

headline: Scrap legal equality duty for public services, says Badenoch
summary: Conservative leader Badenoch advocates for eliminating the legal equality duty for public services. She asserts these rules make public bodies 'institutionally incompetent'. The proposal aims to reform the regulations governing public service operations.

headline: Sea drone rescues US army helicopter crew near Strait of Hormuz
summary: An uncrewed sea vessel successfully rescued two US Army helicopter crew members. Their Apache helicopter had gone down on Monday near the Strait of Hormuz. US officials confirmed the drone-assisted rescue to CBS News.

headline: Man who murdered partner and blew up home jailed
summary: Clifton George has been jailed for the murder of Annabel Rook. He stabbed his partner 31 times before setting fire to their north London home. The court delivered a verdict in the horrific case.
